title: Welcome to Bumbershoot 2026!
message: We are excited to welcome everyone back to Seattle Center. Check the schedule tab to see today's lineup and plan your day.

title: Stage 3 Delayed — 30 Minutes
message: Due to a sound equipment issue, performances at the Vera Project Stage will begin 30 minutes later than scheduled.

title: Weather Advisory
message: Light rain is expected later this evening. Please bring a rain jacket or poncho. Performances will continue as scheduled.

title: Food Vendors Now Open
message: The South Lawn Food Court is now open with over 10 local vendors serving food and drinks.

title: Headliner Show — Early Entry
message: Climate Pledge Arena doors will open 45 minutes early tonight for the headliner performance.

title: Art Workshop Starting Soon
message: The Street Art Workshop at Artists at Play Plaza will begin in 15 minutes. Supplies are limited.

title: Water Refill Stations Available
message: Free water refill stations are available throughout the park. Please stay hydrated during the festival.

title: Closing Ceremony Tonight
message: Join us tonight at Climate Pledge Arena for the closing performance of Bumbershoot 2026.
